shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.value: 0 1px 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 6%, transparent), 0 6px 14px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 10%, transparent), 0 18px 32px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent)

shadows.name: bento-card
shadows.value: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 12%, transparent) 0px 40px 50px -32px, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 8%, transparent) 0px 60px 80px -48px, rgba(255,255,255,0.35) 0px 0px 20px 0px inset
shadows.purpose: Home-page bento card layered ambient + inset white.

shadows.name: nav-liquid-glass
shadows.purpose: Floating nav: pill glass (paired light/dark blocks, SVG url filter).

shadows.name: drawer-settings
shadows.value: 0 -1px 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 6%, transparent), 0 -8px 18px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 -24px 40px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 0 oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / 0.6)
shadows.purpose: Settings drawer: 3-layer right/up ambient + top paper highlight.

motion.name: nav-indicator
motion.purpose: Floating nav indicator slide (glass-button track, NOT a spring bg fill).

components.name: Button (primary)
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-contrast); border-radius: 0.5rem; font-weight: 500; transition: background 180ms ease-out, box-shadow 180ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 90%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-slate) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Floating Nav (liquid glass)
components.description: The one sanctioned glass surface: SVG color-dispersion filter + backdrop-blur pill with a sliding glass-button indicator.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem 2.25rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(7px) saturate(1.4); border: 1px solid rgb(21 20 15 / 0.08); box-shadow: inset 0 0 2px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.55), inset 0 0 10px 4px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.22), 0 6px 24px rgb(17 17 26 / 0.06), 0 12px 40px rgb(17 17 26 / 0.05); }.ds-nav-item { position: relative; z-index: 10; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.25rem; width: 5rem; height: 2.75rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 999px; }.ds-nav-indicator { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 0; z-index: 1; width: 5rem; height: 2.75rem; border-radius: 999px; transform: translateY(-50%); background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.28); border: 1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / 0.4); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px rgb(255 255 255 / 0.6), inset 0 -1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04), 0 2px 6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06), 0 1px 2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); transition: transform 280ms cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1); }.ds-nav-ico { width: 1.25rem; height: 1.25rem; }

components.name: Drawer Panel (settings)
components.description: Right-side settings drawer — flagship panel. Slides from right with spring, 4-layer asymmetric shadow, rounded-3xl.
components.html:
偏好设置

Customize your reading experience
components.css: .ds-drawer { background: var(--paper); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 60%, transparent); border-radius: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 -1px 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 6%, transparent), 0 -8px 18px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent), 0 -24px 40px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 5%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 0 oklch(from var(--paper) l c h / 0.6); }.ds-drawer header { padding: 3rem 2rem 1.25rem; text-align: center; }.ds-drawer h1 { font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.75rem; font-weight: 600; }.ds-bookmark { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0 4rem; margin-top: 1.25rem; }.ds-dot { width: 0.25rem; height: 0.25rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 70%, transparent); }.ds-bookmark-line { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--gradient-decorative-from), var(--gradient-decorative-to)); }.ds-segmented { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; background: var(--warm-gray); padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; margin: 0 2rem; }.ds-segmented button { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 55%, transparent); transition: all 200ms ease-out; }.ds-segmented .ds-active { background: var(--paper); color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent); }

components.name: Segmented Control
components.description: Capsule section switcher — muted track + lifted active tile.
components.css: .ds-seg { display: flex; gap: 0.25rem; background: var(--warm-gray); padding: 0.25rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; }.ds-seg button { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 55%, transparent); transition: all 200ms ease-out; }.ds-seg .ds-active { background: var(--paper); color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 8%, transparent); }

components.name: Slider (custom)
components.description: Themed range with accent track-fill, paper thumb, live value chip.
components.html: 背景模糊8 px
components.css: .ds-slider-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }.ds-slider-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; }.ds-ico { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; color: var(--muted-text); }.ds-value-chip { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; background: var(--warm-gray); color: var(--ink); padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }.ds-slider { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; background: transparent; width: 100%; height: 24px; }.ds-slider::-webkit-slider-runnable-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent) 50%, var(--warm-gray) 50%, var(--warm-gray) 100%); }.ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb { -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none; width: 18px; height: 18px; margin-top: -6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--paper); border: 2px solid var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 1px 2px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 12%, transparent); transition: transform 150ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; }.ds-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb:hover { transform: scale(1.12); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 16%, transparent), 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 15%, transparent); }.ds-slider:focus-visible::-webkit-slider-thumb { box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent) 30%, transparent); }.ds-slider::-moz-range-track { height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--accent) 0%, var(--accent) 50%, var(--warm-gray) 50%, var(--warm-gray) 100%); }.ds-slider::-moz-range-thumb { width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 9999px; background: var(--paper); border: 2px solid var(--accent); }

components.name: Bento Card (signature)
components.description: Squircle home-page card with layered ambient + inset white. Squircle = 48px base / 64px @supports.
components.css: .ds-bento-card { padding: 1.25rem; background: var(--paper); color: var(--ink); border-radius: 48px; box-shadow: color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 12%, transparent) 0px 40px 50px -32px, color-mix(in srgb, var(--ink) 8%, transparent) 0px 60px 80px -48px, rgba(255,255,255,0.35) 0px 0px 20px 0px inset; } @supports (corner-shape: squircle) { .ds-bento-card { corner-shape: squircle; border-radius: 64px; } }

components.name: Modal Panel
components.description: Standard centered modal — rounded-2xl, single-layer shadow.
components.css: .ds-modal-panel { width: 100%; max-width: 560px; padding: 1.5rem; background: var(--paper); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--border) 60%, transparent); border-radius: 1.125rem; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) 10%, transparent); }

components.name: Tag Pill
components.description: Muted rounded pill for categories / status. NOT uppercase (the uppercase tracked style is for Labels only).
components.css: .ds-tag-pill { padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; background: var(--warm-gray); color: var(--muted-text); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.northStar: The Black Cat's Study — Four Rooms, Twenty Surfaces.
narrative.overview: kanocifer.chat is a personal study with a paint box. One author (Kuroome) reads, fishes, and writes. The interface reads as a quiet, deliberate workshop — a liquid-glass nav, literary typography, and a single black cat. Four themes × dark/light = 8 surfaces, one token architecture. The right-side settings drawer is the flagship panel: rounded-3xl, 4-layer asymmetric shadow, capsule segmented controls, custom pseudo-element sliders. Squircle (48px / 64px @supports) is the signature card shape; the liquid-glass nav is the one sanctioned glass surface.
keyCharacteristics: Liquid-glass floating nav (SVG color-dispersion filter) — the one sanctioned glass
Settings drawer: rounded-3xl + 4-layer right-shadow + spring x-entry
Custom CSS-pseudo sliders with accent-track gradient fill

rules.name: The Four-Rooms Rule
rules.body: Every theme is a complete identity, not a recolor.

rules.name: The Theme-Not-Warmth Rule
rules.body: Tinted neutrals lean toward the theme's own hue, not warm/cool by default.

rules.name: The CJK-First Rule
rules.body: Body stack must be CJK-capable; Averia never renders CJK.

rules.name: The Muted-Text-Is-A-Floor Rule
rules.body: Muted-text is the readability floor; re-audit against --paper whenever paper changes.

rules.name: The Lift-From-Below Rule
rules.body: Ambient occlusion + soft white inset highlight. The liquid-glass nav is the one sanctioned glass exception.

rules.name: The No-Fixed-RGBA Rule
rules.body: Shadows derive from --ink / --paper via color-mix (nav glass blocks are the sanctioned exception).

rules.name: The Directional-Shadow Exception
rules.body: The settings drawer shadow falls left/up; all other surfaces are top-down symmetric.

rules.name: The Height-Difference Selection Principle
rules.body: Selection = border + bg-tint + shadow, never border-width alone.

rules.name: The Drawer-Parity Rule
rules.body: Vue + React settings drawers share identical visual specs (parity-migrated 2026-07).

dos: Do use semantic Tailwind utilities (bg-primary, text-foreground, bg-muted, border-border)
Do use color-mix(in oklch, var(--ink) N%, transparent) for theme-adaptive shadows
Do use the squircle (48px / 64px @supports corner-shape) for bento-style cards
Do use the liquid-glass nav (SVG url filter + backdrop-blur, 999px pill) for the floating nav only
Do use the nav's glass-button indicator (translateX slide, cubic-bezier(0.32, 0.72, 0, 1)), not a spring bg fill
Do use rounded-3xl for the settings drawer panel (only sanctioned radius above rounded-2xl)
Do use the asymmetric right-facing 4-layer shadow for the settings drawer only
Do carry live value-chips on the right of slider labels
Do use the capsule segmented control for 2–4 section switching
donts: Don't hardcode color values (#hex, rgba(0,0,0,…)) in component code
Don't ship side-stripe borders (border-left/right > 1px as accent)
Don't ship graduated-numeral section markers — use clean capsule segments
Don't recreate the drawer from an outdated mental model (left-slide / spine / border-t)
Don't use modal/drawer radii below rounded-2xl for panels, rounded-3xl for the settings drawer
Don't conflate Tag Pills (lowercase, untracked) with Labels (uppercase, 0.18em tracked)
Don't extend the nav liquid-glass treatment to other surfaces — it is the one sanctioned glass
